subcodes.first_line: O thou who art devoted to God's Covenant and Testament! Render thanks unto God that the dawn of guidance hath broken forth on the Day of the Manifestation of the exalted Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فدائی عهد و پیمان الهی حمد کن خدا را که طلوع صبح هدی در یوم ظهور رب اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
